4743 Point16 point2 = new Point16(this.reader.ReadInt16(), this.reader.ReadInt16());
4744 int num380 = (int)this.reader.ReadInt16();
4745 TELeashedEntityAnchorWithItem teleashedEntityAnchorWithItem;
4746 if (TileEntity.TryGetAt<TELeashedEntityAnchorWithItem>((int)point2.X, (int)point2.Y, out teleashedEntityAnchorWithItem))
4747 {
4748 teleashedEntityAnchorWithItem.InsertItem(num380);
4749 return;
4750 }
4751 return;
4752 }
4753 case 158:
4754 {
4755 if (Main.netMode == 2)
4756 {
4757 return;
4758 }
4759 byte b23 = this.reader.ReadByte();
4760 Main.player[(int)b23].Spawn(PlayerSpawnContext.TeamSwap);
4761 return;
4762 }
4763 case 159:
4764 {
4765 if (Main.netMode != 2)
4766 {
4767 return;
4768 }
4769 int num381 = (int)this.reader.ReadUInt16();
4770 int num382 = (int)this.reader.ReadUInt16();
4771 NetMessage.SendSection(this.whoAmI, num381, num382);
4772 return;
4773 }
4774 case 160:
4775 {
4776 if (Main.netMode == 2)
4777 {
4778 return;
4779 }
4780 int num383 = (int)this.reader.ReadInt16();
4781 Vector2 vector24 = this.reader.ReadVector2();
4782 Main.item[num383].position = vector24;
4783 return;
4784 }
4785 case 161:
4786 {
4787 string text7 = this.reader.ReadString();
4788 Main.player[this.whoAmI].host = !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Netplay.HostToken) && Netplay.HostToken == text7;
4789 return;
4790 }
4791 default:
4792 goto IL_9FE8;
4793 }
4794 if (Main.netMode != 2)
4795 {
4796 return;
4797 }
4798 if (Netplay.Clients[this.whoAmI].State == 1)
4799 {
4800 Netplay.Clients[this.whoAmI].State = 2;
4801 }
4802 NetMessage.TrySendData(7, this.whoAmI, -1, null, 0, 0f, 0f, 0f, 0, 0, 0);
4803 Main.SyncAnInvasion(this.whoAmI);
4804 return;

4807 {

4810 return;
4811 }
4812 return;

4815 int num385 = this.reader.ReadInt32();

4817 float num387 = this.reader.ReadSingle();
4818 if (num384 < 0 || num384 > Main.maxNPCs)
4819 {
4820 return;
4821 }
4822 if (Main.netMode == 1)
4823 {
4824 Main.npc[num384].moneyPing(new Vector2(num386, num387));
4825 Main.npc[num384].extraValue = num385;
4826 return;
4827 }
4828 Main.npc[num384].extraValue += num385;

4835 }
4836 }
